description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely female, rendered in a classical style with a naturalistic pose. The figure stands upright on a rectangular base, with one arm bent and the hand resting near the chin, while the other arm crosses the torso. The body is robust and detailed, with visible musculature and anatomical features, and the head is slightly bowed, suggesting contemplation or introspection. The back of the sculpture shows subtle texturing and some roughness, especially near the lower legs and base, possibly representing unfinished stone or a stylized support. The surface appears to be made of white or light-colored stone, such as marble, with a matte finish and some minor discolorations or patina. The base is darker, providing contrast and stability to the figure, and the overall form is solid and monolithic.
description: A classical-style standing human figure sculpture in white stone, with one arm bent near the chin and a robust, naturalistic form on a dark rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the figure's face, bent arm near the chin, and detailed torso.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back, shoulders, and textured support near the legs.
description_view_2: Back-right view emphasizing the curvature of the spine and the rougher texture at the base.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the facial features, crossed arms, and the full stance of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
